welcome:
Juju CLI Prototype — Migration & Bootstrap Observability

This prototype demonstrates two design approaches for managing
migration and bootstrap lifecycle operations.

PATH A — Integrated into existing commands:

  Migration:
    start   juju migrate my-db-model
    stop    juju stop-migration
    list    juju models
    view    juju show-model my-db-model
            juju show-model my-db-model-failed
            juju show-model frontend                 (baseline)
    logs    juju show-model my-db-model --migration-logs

  Bootstrap:
    start   juju bootstrap
    stop    juju stop-bootstrap jaas-prod-eu
    list    juju controllers
    view    juju show-controller jaas-prod-eu
            juju show-controller test1               (baseline)
    logs    juju show-controller jaas-prod-eu --bootstrap-logs

PATH B — First-class objects:

  Migration:
    start   juju jaas migrate-model
    stop    juju jaas stop-migration mig-a3f74b
    list    juju jaas migrations
    view    juju jaas migration mig-a3f74b
            juju jaas migration mig-e812cc           (failed)
    logs    juju jaas migration-logs mig-a3f74b
            juju jaas migration-logs mig-e812cc      (failed)

  Bootstrap:
    start   juju jaas bootstrap-controller
    stop    juju jaas stop-bootstrap boot-7d29af
    list    juju jaas bootstraps
    view    juju jaas bootstrap boot-7d29af
    logs    juju jaas bootstrap-logs boot-7d29af

Type 'juju --help' for command help.

juju.description: Juju CLI — Migration and bootstrap observability prototype

models.description: [Path A] List models with inline migration status
example: List all models on the current controller with migration status

handler.output:
Use --refresh option with this command to see the latest information.

Controller: test1

show-model.description: [Path A] Show model details including migration state. Use --migration-logs to view migration logs.
example: Show a model with an active migration
Show migration logs for a model
Show a model with a failed migration
Show a model with no migration

migrate.description: [Path A] Migrate a model to another controller

my-db-model.description: Migrate my-db-model to a target controller

handler.output:
Migration of "my-db-model" started.

Run "juju show-model my-db-model" to monitor progress.
Run "juju show-model my-db-model --migration-logs" to view live logs.

stop-migration.description: [Path A] Stop the active migration on the current model
example: Stop the active migration for the current model

handler.output:
Active migration found:
  Model:   my-db-model
  Target:  jaas-prod-eu
  Status:  syncing
  Started: 2026-03-06T10:14:22Z

handler.name: confirmStop
handler.message: Stop this migration? The model will remain on the source controller.

handler.output: Migration stopped. Model "my-db-model" remains on controller "test1".

jaas.description: [Path B] JAAS management — migrations and bootstraps as first-class objects

migrate-model.description: Initiate a model migration to another controller

Run "juju jaas migration-logs mig-a3f74b" to view live logs.

Run "juju jaas migrations" to see updated status.
